Container.Name: Oikos
Container.Overview:
Oikos is a self-hosted family planner PWA. It keeps your household organized — tasks, groceries, meals, recipes, calendar, documents, budget, housekeeping, notes, contacts and birthdays — in one private place, without cloud accounts or subscriptions. Each module is independent: use what fits, skip what doesn't. Polished mobile-first interface, offline-capable PWA, optional CalDAV/CardDAV and Google Calendar sync, OIDC SSO, and encrypted-at-rest storage (SQLCipher).
REQUIRED: Set a long random SESSION_SECRET. RECOMMENDED: Set a strong DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY to encrypt the database at rest — without it the database and any synced calendar/contact credentials are stored unencrypted. Generate secrets with: openssl rand -base64 48
After first start, open the WebUI and create your admin account.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the Oikos web interface.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Database and stored app data (uploads, documents).

Config.Name: Backups
Config.Description: Destination folder for scheduled and manual database backups.

Config.Name: Modules (optional)
Config.Description: Optional: drop-in folder for additional Oikos modules. Leave default if unused.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: REQUIRED. A long random string used to sign sessions. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY
Config.Description: RECOMMENDED. Strong key to encrypt the database at rest (SQLCipher). Leave empty for unencrypted SQLite. Cannot be changed later without re-encrypting. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone, e.g. Europe/Berlin. Affects scheduled backups and reminders.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECURE
Config.Description: Set to true only when serving Oikos over HTTPS behind a reverse proxy. Keep false for direct HTTP access on the LAN.

Config.Name: TRUST_PROXY
Config.Description: Use 1 behind one reverse proxy (Caddy/nginx/Traefik), or 'loopback' for direct (no proxy) access.

Config.Name: DB_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the SQLite database inside the container. Keep default unless you know what you are doing.

Config.Name: OPENWEATHER_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional. OpenWeatherMap API key to enable the weather widget.

Config.Name: OPENWEATHER_CITY
Config.Description: Optional. City for the weather widget, e.g. Berlin.

Config.Name: BACKUP_ENABLED
Config.Description: Optional. Enable automated database backups (default: true).

Config.Name: BACKUP_SCHEDULE
Config.Description: Optional. Cron schedule for automated backups (default: 2 AM daily).

Config.Name: BACKUP_KEEP
Config.Description: Optional. Number of backups to retain (default: 7).
